items.title: Silver Linings in Psychological Disorders: An Agenda for Research and Social Change
items.author: June Gruber, Cassondra Lyman, Chloe Plaisance, Jonathan Rottenberg
items.content: <article>Current Directions in Psychological Science, Ahead of Print. Conventional research on people with psychological disorders is negatively focused, concentrating on what is aberrant and harmful about psychopathology. Characterizing patterns of emotional and behavioral disturbances has helped illuminate the origins of ...</article>
